news-global-econ.title: Trump, Starmer agree Strait of Hormuz must reopen as Middle East conflict escalates
news-global-econ.description: Strait of Hormuz closure dominates a Trump-Starmer call, as Trump's 48-hour ultimatum to Iran warns of further U.S. strikes on Iranian energy infrastructure.

news-global-econ.title: ‘CODE RED’ Author on ‘War Room’: Fear of AI Job Losses Being Used to Push Wealth Redistribution
news-global-econ.description: Wynton Hall, Breitbart News social media director and author of  Code Red: The Left, the Right, China, and the Race to Control AI, explained on Steve Bannon’s War Room show how "well funded" powers are using the fear of AI-induced job losses to push for unive…

news-global-econ.title: Scott Bessent calls out 'terrible framing' during clash with NBC News host on Iranian oil
news-global-econ.description: Scott Bessent accused NBC's Kristen Welker of "terrible framing" during an exchange about Iranian oil on Sunday, as the host pressed the treasury secretary on why the U.S. lifted sanctions.

news-global-econ.title: Iran threatens mass ‘water war’ with strikes on key plants in days, UN official warns
news-global-econ.description: Iran threatens to target desalination and energy infrastructure within days, a U.N. official warns, citing lasting consequences for global markets and water supplies.

news-global-econ.title: As cattle herds shrink and beef prices rise, investors back AI cow collars
news-global-econ.description: A New Zealand agtech startup's AI-powered cattle collars are drawing major investor interest as beef prices climb 18% and labor shortages hit farms.

news-global-soc.title: World Cup teams finalize US base camps as host cities prepare for global crowds
news-global-soc.description: Cities across the US are preparing World Cup base camps as teams finalize training sites and fans prepare to travel for the 2026 tournament.
